_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Arihant Abode
project.address: Plot No. GH-4B, Sector 10, Greater Noida West, Uttar Pradesh 201306
project.description: Premium G+22 high-rise ready-to-move project constructed using Korean Mivan technology in the prime Sector 10 micro-market.
project.long_description: Arihant Abode is a premium, ready-to-move-in residential society in Sector 10, Greater Noida West. Spread over a sprawling 5-acre campus, the project comprises 11 high-rise towers rising to G+22 floors, housing a total of 944 finely planned apartments. Built entirely using advanced Korean Mivan Aluminum Formwork construction technology, the development delivers superior structural alignment, leak-free masonry, and outstanding earthquake resistance. Designed with a 'customer-first' philosophy, the towers feature only four units per floor, ensuring every single home functions as a spacious corner unit with three open sides for optimal natural light and fresh ventilation. Additionally, the project features a massive 25,000 sq ft clubhouse elevated on the 3rd and 4th floor levels, alongside an elevated swimming pool on the 5th floor, creating an exquisite leisure zone while maximizing ground-level pedestrian safety.

builder.name: Arihant Group
builder.company_overview: Arihant Group (Arihant Buildcon) is a highly respected residential developer in Delhi NCR, active in real estate since 1998. The group has successfully delivered iconic residential landmarks across Noida, Greater Noida, and Indirapuram. Renowned for consistent delivery schedules, robust brick-and-mortar quality, and customer-focused layouts, the builder continues to expand its footprint in Noida Extension with premium yet value-driven typologies.

unit_types.name: 2 BHK
unit_types.subtitle: Compact smart 2 bedroom home
unit_types.description: Elegant 2 BHK corner unit featuring highly optimized room dimensions, a master bedroom with attached bathroom, modular kitchen, and double balconies overlooking central greens.
whats_included: Vitrified tiles in living and dining zones

unit_types.name: 3 BHK Elite
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious family 3 BHK corner unit
unit_types.description: Luxurious 3 BHK configuration offering 3 distinct balconies, 10-foot floor-to-ceiling heights, vitrified tiles, separate formal dining niche, and 3 sides open layout.
whats_included: Modular kitchen fittings up to counter level

connectivity.name: Planned Sector 10 Metro Station
connectivity.notes: On the future Aqua line extension

connectivity.name: 130m Noida Extension Main Road
connectivity.notes: Connects directly to Sector 75 and Central Noida

connectivity.name: Delhi World Public School
connectivity.notes: Reputed school in Greater Noida West

assumptions: GST is 0% as OC has been received.
Prices reflect active resale market trades in Q3 2026.

payment_plan.notes: Resale registry schedules require full payment within 60 days.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Arihant Abode represents one of the most reliable and structural-safe ready-to-move-in family communities in Greater Noida West.
why_buy: Korean Mivan construction ensures outstanding structural strength and zero water seepage.
A true corner layout offering 3 open sides for only 4 flats per floor.
Zero delivery risk with completed handovers, active registries, and 0% GST.
why_avoid: Sector 10 is currently undergoing road paving; dust and secondary commercial setups are common.
The proposed Aqua Metro extension is still in planning phases, requiring short commutes to Sector 51.
decision_profile.best_for: Young IT families and working couples seeking structurally superior, ready ready-to-move-in homes.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Speculative short-term investors or luxury seekers looking for ultra-exclusive low density towers.

buyerPersonas.headline: Safety and Practical Space
reasons: Pedestrian-only ground levels provide excellent safety for kids.
Spacious corner apartments are ideal for active nuclear families.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Consistent growth driven by Noida Extension demand.
investment_insights.rental_desc: High demand from IT professionals in Sector 62 and Noida hub.

persona_profile.work_location: Noida Sector 62/63 and Noida IT corridor
persona_profile.motivation_note: Driven by superior Korean construction safety, immediate moving capability, and safe car-free walking spaces.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: A highly compelling ready-to-move-in project. Built with Mivan tech, it offers top-tier structural durability and corner privacy in Noida Extension.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Excellent for end-users seeking zero delivery stress. Walk directly into a finished home with 0% GST benefits.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Steady wealth accumulation. Proximity to the 130m main road and the upcoming metro ensures strong valuation support.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Outstanding. The pedestrian-only ground layouts keep children completely insulated from traffic hazards.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Ideal defensive asset with stable capital appreciation and high tenant demand from Central Noida professionals.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Good mid-market quality with grand entrance lobbies and premium modular specifications, though not ultra-luxury.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Extremely low delivery risk. Ensure clean resale paperwork and NOC checks on individual registries.
walk_away_conditions: Outstanding builder maintenance dues on the specific resale unit.
negotiation_leverage: Resale competition from multiple towers allows hard pricing negotiation on higher floors.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Perfect time to acquire. Avoid waiting for future pre-launches when completed assets are trading at justified rates.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Korean Mivan structure provides much higher leak-proofing; elevated clubhouse offers wider skyline views.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Slightly closer to Noida main boundary; slightly lower unit density.
competitors.verdict: Choose Arihant Abode for superior concrete quality and 3-sided corner open layout; choose CRC for closer commute.
competitors.price_delta_note: Arihant Abode is approx par with CRC Sublimis.
